pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh which explicitly outputs to /tmp/abc_cycle_counting_locations_result.json and verifier.py which reads from this path.
Confirmed via verifier.py logic which defines the pass_threshold variable to be 75 by default if not set in metadata.

Confirmed via setup_task.sh which synthetically creates the SKUs with 10, 50, and 200 quantities, and verifier.py which explicitly requires frequencies of 15, 30, and 90 respectively for Zone A, Zone B, and Zone C.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated products (NVIDIA RTX 4090 GPU, ASUS ROG Crosshair X670E Hero, Southwire Cat6 CMP Plenum 1000ft) and their corresponding stock quantities (10, 50, 200), which are injected into the Odoo database via XML-RPC in setup_task.sh. The expected zones (Zone A, Zone B, Zone C), their required cycle counting frequencies (15, 30, 90 days), and the expected SKU locations exactly match the task description instructions and verifier.py logic.
